title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Embassy Office Parks REIT

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Embassy Office Parks REIT
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Embassy Office Parks REIT in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Embassy Office Parks REIT:
Embassy Office Parks REIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Office Parks REIT!
